Off Calendar Aug-07-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff Alfred Wolfers' motion is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant Carr Capital Management's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process.
